summary.authoritative_rule: the first local 1min rules can advance beyond seed-only status only when the broader false-positive surface remains bounded away from clean controls

triage_rows.rationale: broader expansion is acceptable only if the first false-positive audit stays off clean controls
even a bounded false-positive profile does not authorize replay contamination

interpretation: V1.32J turns the first broader 1-minute false-positive audit into a governance verdict.
If clean controls stay untouched, the rule candidates can graduate from seed-only to bounded governed supervision; otherwise they stay seed-only.
